maxRounds.description: Maximum number of LLM rounds (non-final steps + error-fix attempts) per invocation. Default: 5.

maxCapturedOutputChars.description: Maximum characters of captured intermediate command output sent to the LLM. Longer output is truncated. Default: 200000 (~200KB).

maxAttachedInputChars.description: Maximum characters of the attached-input preview shown to the LLM. Longer input is previewed truncated but the full bytes are on disk at $WRAP_TEMP_DIR/input for commands to use. Default: 200000 (~200KB).

verbose.description: Enable verbose mode. Surfaces internal pipeline steps on stderr.

yolo.description: Skip confirmation dialogs — auto-execute all commands regardless of risk. All safety gates disabled.

logTraces.description: Capture full LLM prompts and wire-level responses in the invocation log. Off by default.

providers.description: Map of provider name → entry. Known names: anthropic, openai, ollama, claude-code. Any other key is treated as an OpenAI-compatible endpoint and requires baseURL, apiKey, and model.

apiKey.description: API key. Use "$ENV_VAR" to read from environment. Omit for the SDK's default env var (e.g. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY).

baseURL.description: Custom API endpoint (required for ollama and OpenAI-compatible providers).

model.description: Model identifier the provider should use.

defaultProvider.description: Name of the entry in `providers` to use by default.

nerdFonts.description: Enable Nerd Font icons in the TUI. Requires a Nerd Font active in your terminal.

appearance.description: Terminal color scheme. 'auto' detects from terminal background. Override with WRAP_THEME env var.
